results.title: Wyndham Clark says second US Open win is ‘redemption’
results.description: SHINNECOCK HILLS, N.Y. — Wyndham Clark admitted some of the adverse reaction towards him was “self-deserved” but felt his second U.S. Open win in four years provided him with redemption. Twelve months ago the American caused controversy when he missed...

results.title: Defiant Cape Verde hold Uruguay to 2-2 draw in Miami thriller
results.description: Cape Verde put in another brilliant performance to hold Uruguay to a 2-2 draw in ​a Group H thriller on Sunday, backing up their goalless draw with Spain in their first ever World Cup match ‌by defying a second footballing powerhouse.

results.title: Sabalenka loses deciding set 6-0 to Pegula in Berlin
results.description: Aryna Sabalenka lost another deciding set without winning a game as an impressive Jessica Pegula beat the world number one to reach the Berlin Open final. Belarusian Sabalenka never looked settled against Pegula, who recovered from losing a tight second set to come through 6-4 6-7 (4-7) 6-0. American Pegula had lost five of her [...] The post Sabalenka loses deciding set 6-0 to Pegula in Berlin appeared first on Ghana News Online .

results.title: Cape Verde tie Uruguay to continue captivating World Cup journey
results.description: Helio Valera scored the tying goal after collecting a loose ball to allow Cape Verde to play Uruguay to a 2-2 tie on Sunday in World Cup Group H play

results.title: Wyndham Clark avoids record collapse and holds on to win the US Open
Strong finish carries Mystics to upset of league-best Lynx
results.description: Sonia Citron scored 21 points on Sunday to help the visiting Washington Mystics earn an 84-79 victory over the league-best Minnesota Lynx in Minneapol

results.title: Cabo Verde draw 2-2 with Uruguay in FIFA World Cup 2026 match
results.description: Cabo Verde made history with a 2-2 draw against Uruguay in their World Cup 2026 debut, showcasing a remarkable performance at Miami Stadium.

results.title: 33761185-high-scaled-aspect-ratio-512-320
results.description: O Uruguai empatou com Cabo Verde por 2 a 2, na noite deste domingo (21), em jogo válido pela fase de grupos da Copa do Mundo.
